valueStreams.name: Digitize and optimize parking operations
valueStreams.description: Move from fragmented parking operations to a unified, data-driven operating model for payments, access, pricing, and performance management.

stages.name: Map current estate
stages.description: Inventory all lots, curb zones, payment methods, occupancy patterns, hardware, and enforcement processes.

stages.name: Deploy digital payment and access
stages.description: Enable app-based payment, smart pay stations, and LPR-led entry and exit to reduce friction and manual handling.

stages.name: Optimize policy and pricing
stages.description: Adjust rates, dwell limits, and zone policies based on demand, events, and compliance patterns.

stages.name: Expand supply monetization
stages.description: Add reserved parking and EV charging to increase yield and improve asset attractiveness.

stages.name: Continuously manage performance
stages.description: Monitor performance against revenue, occupancy, compliance, and service targets.

valueStreams.name: Turn fragmented mobility data into policy decisions
valueStreams.description: Create a citywide view of parking, traffic, mobility use, and transport interactions to support transport demand management and policy design.

stages.name: Aggregate mobility signals
stages.description: Collect data from parking, EV charging, transport services, and usage channels.

stages.name: Analyze demand and behavior
stages.description: Identify hotspots, underused assets, travel patterns, and response to pricing or policy shifts.

stages.name: Model and execute interventions
stages.description: Adjust parking, transport, or access policies to influence travel demand and service outcomes.

stages.name: Iterate based on outcomes
stages.description: Track whether mobility behavior, congestion, and infrastructure utilization improve over time.

valueStreams.name: Modernize fare collection without disrupting service
valueStreams.description: Introduce open payment and modern ticketing devices while maintaining continuity across current transit operations.

stages.name: Assess current fare estate
stages.description: Map current validators, ticketing flows, channels, payment types, and operational constraints.

stages.name: Introduce open payment
stages.description: Enable contactless bank card and device-based travel across modes with automatic fare calculation.

stages.name: Upgrade field devices
stages.description: Deploy validators, vending machines, and driver consoles where needed.

stages.name: Monitor live performance
stages.description: Track service, boarding, device uptime, and payment exceptions in real time.

valueStreams.name: Control parking spend across employees and vehicles
valueStreams.description: Replace ad hoc employee parking payments and reimbursements with governed, centrally billed parking operations.

stages.name: Set up company policy
stages.description: Define which users, vehicles, geographies, and parking types are allowed.

stages.name: Enable employee parking flows
stages.description: Give staff app-based parking access for start, stop, extend, and payment.

stages.name: Consolidate billing
stages.description: Bundle transactions into one invoice and attribute spend to teams or projects.

stages.name: Monitor and optimize
stages.description: Review usage, exceptions, and policy adherence to improve cost performance.

operatingModelNotes: The Arrive enterprise architecture domain covers the business, application, data, and technology structures required to operate parking discovery, booking, access control, and partner mobility workflows.
Business capabilities should be mapped to accountable owners and supported by governed application services.
Cross-domain dependencies should be handled through explicit value streams and service contracts.
